Farah Haddad

Director of Planning & Development

Organised and systematic Calm under political pressure Evidence-based but empathetic Detail-oriented Team-focused

Areas of Expertise

  • WA Planning and Development Act
  • Residential density codes and R-codes
  • Community consultation processes
  • Heritage and environmental planning
  • Planning application workflows
  • State government planning directives
  • Local planning schemes
  • Development assessment processes

For Other Topics

  • Ceo: speak with Helen Marchetti
  • Community: speak with Tony Sparks
  • Digital: speak with Aiden Cross

Schedule an Interview

You need to book an appointment before speaking with Farah Haddad.
